New York Knicks.core_identity: Half-court pressure team with elite offensive rebounding, multiple wing rebounders, and structural playoff glass pressure.

preferred_markets: wing rebounds
team rebounds/OREB correlated props
low-number totals when NYK controls glass
caution_markets: fading NYK margin when opponent turnover drag is active

Atlanta Hawks.core_identity: High-variance wing/guard rebound team with pace-dependent board spikes but fragile half-court execution under pressure.

preferred_markets: Dyson Daniels rebounds when 30+ minutes
opponent rebound overs
opponent spread if ATL TOV% spikes
caution_markets: ATL comeback paths when TOV% >18 and 3PT% <30

Denver Nuggets.core_identity: Positioning-based half-court team with Jokic control, stable rebounding median, but vulnerable to perimeter collapse and role shifts under defensive pressure.

preferred_markets: Jokic rebound/assist structure
unders when Denver pace control plus opponent injury shock
caution_markets: Jokic 1.5+ threes when interior burden rises

Minnesota Timberwolves.core_identity: Elite defensive rebounding and rim-protection team with double-big physicality; injury shock can suppress creation but replacement usage can spike.

preferred_markets: opponent rebound unders vs MIN frontcourt
injury-adjusted full-game unders
MIN spread when replacement scoring validates
caution_markets: blind under if replacement scorer immediately absorbs usage efficiently

Oklahoma City Thunder.core_identity: SGA-led low-turnover efficiency engine with small/hybrid lineups, spacing bursts, and high rebound volatility.

preferred_markets: OKC overs/team totals when SGA controls rim and TOV% <10
SGA points/FT-driven props
opponent PF/C rebounds vs small OKC
caution_markets: halftime unders based only on hot-shooting regression

Phoenix Suns.core_identity: Star/wing scoring team with midrange and secondary scoring support, but limited defensive resistance and matchup-dependent glass.

preferred_markets: opponent team totals vs PHX defense
overs when secondary scorers are live
caution_markets: PHX side if opponent controls pace and turnovers

Orlando Magic.core_identity: Physical slashing team with starter-unit possession control, Banchero/Wagner closing creation, WCJ rebound pressure, and Bane shooting ceiling.

preferred_markets: ORL spread/ML when starters dominate rebounding
WCJ rebounds
Banchero PRA/FT-driven creation
caution_markets: fading ORL lead when Banchero/Wagner are closing cleanly

Detroit Pistons.core_identity: Young high-variance team with extra-possession upside but primary ballhandler turnover drag and center foul fragility.

preferred_markets: DET rebounds/blocks in chaos games
opponent totals if Cade turnover drag active
caution_markets: DET ML fake value vs pressure defenses
